name: single-file-fix
description: Fix a failing test in one file. No hidden dependency.

name: flaky-test-retry
description: Agent re-runs a flaky test that fails ~stochastically for reasons unrelated to its edit, and re-edits the same file each time it sees red.

name: circular-tool-delegation
description: A search tool returns a result the agent doesn't trust, so it calls a second tool to verify, which recommends calling the first tool again.

name: goal-drift-refactor
description: A refactor task where each step's output nudges the agent's understanding of "done" slightly further, so the stopping condition is never satisfied.

name: tool-error-loop
description: A misconfigured tool call returns a malformed-input error; the agent retries with a near-identical payload instead of changing approach.
